title: Pre-Course Survey: CAT Grade Control & Machine Guidance Systems

questions.question: On a scale of 1-5, how confident are you setting up a CAT Grade Control system on an excavator or dozer?
Under the Health and Safety at Work Act 2015 (HSWA), who is primarily responsible for ensuring workers are competent to operate machine guidance systems?
options: PCBU (Person Conducting a Business or Undertaking)

questions.question: How experienced are you with establishing and verifying physical benchmarks on a construction site?
What is the primary purpose of a benchmark in machine guidance systems?
options: To provide a known reference point for calibration and verification

questions.question: How confident are you calibrating a CAT Grade Control system using GPS base stations or network RTK?
What file format is commonly used to load design surfaces into CAT Grade Control systems?
Describe your experience with loading and managing design files on machine guidance systems. What challenges have you encountered?
How experienced are you with performing machine calibrations (bucket/blade dimensions, mast measurements, etc.)?
What is the typical accuracy range for a properly calibrated CAT Grade Control 3D system using GPS?
How confident are you troubleshooting GPS signal issues or loss of RTK corrections on site?
Which of the following is a critical safety consideration when using machine guidance systems under HSWA?
options: Systems eliminate the need for spotters
Operators must still maintain visual awareness and not rely solely on the screen
GPS accuracy is guaranteed in all conditions

questions.question: Describe a situation where you had to verify or check the accuracy of a machine guidance system. What process did you follow?
How experienced are you with conducting daily pre-start checks on CAT Grade Control hardware (antennas, sensors, cables)?
What does RTK stand for in GPS-based machine guidance?
What are the most common errors or mistakes you have observed when setting up or using machine guidance systems on site?
How confident are you interpreting cut/fill displays and grade indicators on the CAT Grade Control screen during operation?
According to HSWA, what must be done before allowing a worker to operate machine guidance equipment?
options: They must have 5 years of excavator experience
They must be provided with information, training, and supervision to work safely
They must hold a university degree
They must be over 25 years old

questions.question: How experienced are you training or mentoring other operators on CAT Grade Control systems?
If you were to train a new operator on machine guidance systems, what are the three most important things you would teach them first?
How confident are you explaining the relationship between site benchmarks, GPS coordinates, and design file accuracy to others?

description: Pre-course survey for CAT Grade Control and Machine Guidance Systems. Benchmark your knowledge before training.
